series_metadata.series_title: Investigations and Security Department Incident Reports and Investigation File
series_metadata.series_description: This file contains investigations conducted by the Investigations and Security Division, such as altered tickets, attempted cashing of stolen tickets, investigative reports for video lottery terminal facilities, special investigations and complaints, including the original complaint or request for same, result of the investigation, supporting documents, related statements, and affidavits.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Ensure all records and supporting documentation are included in the case file in Case Management System. Retain in the system for five (5) years from the date of closure of the case, then destroy., Electronic: Delete
